overall.description: Batman stands on a high structure overlooking a neon-lit Gotham City at night, observing the cityscape before diving off into the urban canyon below. The footage is from the video game Batman: Arkham Knight, featuring dark atmospheric lighting with blue and purple neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise observation deck overlooking downtown Gotham

agents.ego_description: Batman stands motionless on the edge of a high structure, cape fluttering in the wind, surveying the neon-lit cityscape below

entered.detail: Massive illuminated screen displaying a face, mounted on a suspension tower structure
Dense collection of illuminated skyscrapers with various neon signs and window lights
Industrial crane with yellow arm visible against the night sky
Rust-colored metal safety railing along the edge of the platform
Tall building facade covered in blue and purple neon lighting
Gothic-style tower structure supporting the billboard with cable stays

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on a high concrete platform overlooking the sprawling Gotham City skyline at night. The scene is dominated by a massive digital billboard mounted on a suspension tower in the distance, surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers. A yellow construction crane is visible on the left, and a metal railing provides safety at the platform's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial descent through urban canyon between skyscrapers

events.description: Batman leaps off the structure and begins diving headfirst toward the streets below

agents.ego_description: Batman dives headfirst from the structure, cape trailing behind, rapidly descending toward the lower city streets between buildings

entered.detail: Illuminated street visible far below between the canyon of buildings
Close-up view of building walls and windows rushing past during descent
Tall building sides forming a narrow corridor through the city

segments.scene_description: Batman launches into a dive from the high platform, transitioning from stationary observation to rapid descent through the urban canyon. The camera follows the dive, revealing the street level far below and the close facades of surrounding buildings. The skyline and billboard recede into the distance as the perspective shifts to a steep downward angle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stationary observation of a neon-lit skyline into a rapid, steep descent through an urban canyon. It begins with Batman standing on a high concrete platform, overlooking a sprawling cityscape dominated by a massive digital billboard and a yellow construction crane. As he launches into a dive, the perspective shifts from a wide vista to a plummeting downward angle, causing the distant skyscrapers and billboard to recede. The scene then accelerates through the air, bringing the close facades of surrounding buildings into sharp focus before revealing the street level far below.
